title: Everbuild Tarmac Restorer – Restores Tarmac To A Deep Black Finish – High-Performance Surface Coating – Quick-Drying – Black – 5 Litre
features: HIGH PERFORMANCE – This black tarmac restorer is specially formulated for tarmac drives.
DURABLE – Provides a tough, durable, low-sheen black coat.
PROTECTIVE – Guards against weathering, oil and petrol spills and unsightly plant/weed growth.
QUICK-DRYING – The quick drying formula enables driveways to be used after just 4 hours.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? Surfaces must be clean and free from any loose dirt or debris, and water/puddle must be removed prior to application. Always readinstructions priorto use. Stir well beforeand periodically during use. Stir well before and periodically during use. Apply with a brush or long pile roller in an even coat across the entire surface. Apply in 2 coats allowing 4 hours between coats.
